article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.13. CC - HVAC System Maint. and Repair Services 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $579,600 contract extension for Burnaby city building HVAC services
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on extending its heating and cooling (HVAC) maintenance contract with Just Mechanical Ltd. for an estimated $579,600 including taxes, to keep city buildings running while a new competitive bidding process wraps up.
briefs.action_required: If you provide HVAC or facilities services, watch for the upcoming Burnaby RFP — a new contract will be awarded soon.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — HVAC contract change vote
